senses.gloss: The fourteenth letter of the Arabic alphabet, written in the Arabic script; preceded by ش (š) and followed by ض (ḍ).
The eighteenth numeral symbol of the Arabic alphabet (traditional abjad order, used for list numbering), written in the Arabic script; preceded by ف (f) and followed by ق (q).

etymology.text: From the Nabataean letter 𐢙 (ṣ, “ṣade”), derived from the Phoenician letter 𐤑 (ṣ, “ṣade”), from an uncertain Egyptian hieroglyph (𓇑?). See also ܨ (ṣ, “ṣade”), צ (ts, “tsadi”), Cyrillic Ц.
